name: Wind-Tunnel Seed Courier
description: Control a persistent local force field and carry a momentum-bearing seed pod through four physical air gates into its dock.
natural_language: Set and correct the local fans, then carry the seed through all four air gates into the receiving funnel.

metadata.notes: New Interaction VII–VIII candidate. The browser renders the generated physical state and records only ordinary pointer/keyboard control events; the live server and exported verifier independently replay the mechanic-specific geometry or dynamics.
